name: mvs-monthly-value-sniper
description: MVS — Monthly Value Sniper v8.4. KuCoin API for Ghana. Two-timeframe (4H bias + 15min entry, scanned every 15min), 4 symbols, POC+VAH+VAL+FIBO, zero lagging indicators. Public repo, unlimited GitHub Actions minutes. Phone + Laptop + GitHub Actions deployment ready.
author: Abdin
